title: Understanding Thermal Resistance in Liquid-Cooled Power Electronics
excerpt: Wide-bandgap (WBG) technologies have changed the design landscape. Devices now switch faster, operate at higher voltages, and deliver unprecedented power densities. Yet those same strengths bring new challenges: high local heat flux, tight packaging, and higher junction-temperature limits that demand more sophisticated cooling.

title: Thermal design notes for 105°C coolant
excerpt: Key pin-fin choices, pressure drop targets, and realistic °C/W numbers at 5–10 LPM.
